title: Airella multiculmis
taxonomy: Airella multiculmis is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a type of tufted grass that is native to North America. This species belongs to the genus Airella, which is part of the tribe Stipeae. The classification of Airella multiculmis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the rank of species within the botanical nomenclature. This classification is based on the Linnaean system of binomial nomenclature.
